hero.title: Newsletters and parish documents
hero.lede: This archive is designed for weekly newsletters, bulletins, reports, and parish documents.

intro.title: A simple document library
intro.body: The newest newsletter appears first, followed by the full archive and any parish documents.
intro.asideBody: Upload a newsletter PDF in the CMS and it will appear here automatically.

cards.title: Latest Newsletter
paragraphs: The newest uploaded newsletter is highlighted here automatically.

cards.title: Newsletter Archive
paragraphs: Use this list for weekly bulletins, printed newsletters, or school-parish notices.

cards.title: Parish Documents
paragraphs: Upload policies, synod notes, safeguarding resources, and other public documents here.
